requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence and Belgium-Specific Requirements for PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据及比利时光伏逆变器特定要求
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據及比利時光伏逆變器特定要求

summary.en: For Belgium solar PV projects, inverter safety documentation should be prepared around IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test evidence for the exact inverter model or family, in support of CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU. NBN is the national standards body, CREG oversees the federal energy sector, Elia controls the high-voltage grid interface, and regional DSOs (Fluvius, ORES/RESA, BRUGEL) control the practical grid-connection interface for low-voltage and medium-voltage installations. Project submissions should include accredited IEC safety reports, installation manuals, ratings, nameplate data, protection-device coordination, earthing instructions, and environmental limits. Installation manuals and safety instructions for the Belgian market are commonly required in Dutch and/or French depending on the installation region (Flanders/Brussels or Wallonia).
summary.zh: 对于比利时太阳能光伏项目，逆变器安全文件应围绕准确型号或系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式试验证据准备，以支持依据低电压指令2014/35/EU的CE标志。NBN是国家标准机构，CREG监管联邦能源行业，Elia控制高压电网接口，区域配电运营商（Fluvius、ORES/RESA、BRUGEL）控制低压和中压安装的实际并网接口。项目提交文件应包括认可的IEC安全报告、安装手册、额定值、铭牌数据、保护装置配合、接地说明和环境限值。比利时市场的安装手册和安全说明通常须根据安装所在地区（弗兰德/布鲁塞尔或瓦隆）以荷语和/或法语提供。
summary.zht: 對於比利時太陽能光伏項目，逆變器安全文件應圍繞準確型號或系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式試驗證據準備，以支持依據低電壓指令2014/35/EU的CE標誌。NBN是國家標準機構，CREG監管聯邦能源行業，Elia控制高壓電網介面，區域配電運營商（Fluvius、ORES/RESA、BRUGEL）控制低壓和中壓安裝的實際併網介面。項目提交文件應包括認可的IEC安全報告、安裝手冊、額定值、銘牌資料、保護裝置配合、接地說明和環境限值。比利時市場的安裝手冊和安全說明通常須根據安裝所在地區（法蘭德斯/布魯塞爾或瓦隆）以荷語和/或法語提供。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
NBN standards adoption and conformity expectations where applicable
CREG, Elia, Fluvius, ORES/RESA project documentation requirements for grid-connected solar PV equipment
Belgium linguistic requirements — Dutch for Flanders/Brussels, French for Wallonia, installation documentation commonly required in both

summary.en: China safety documentation for PV grid-connected inverters commonly uses GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, domestic CQC or CGC voluntary certification, and CNAS-accredited laboratory reports. These documents are useful for supplier qualification but are not automatically accepted as IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence for Belgium projects or as EU LVD conformity. Chinese safety reports may also be based on China-rated configurations, labels, manuals, surge protection, and 220/380 V assumptions, while Belgium project files must reflect 230/400 V, 50 Hz installation conditions and EU CE conformity framework requirements.
summary.zh: 中国光伏并网逆变器安全文件通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、国内CQC或CGC自愿认证及CNAS认可实验室报告。这些文件有助于供应商资质评估，但不能自动作为比利时项目的IEC 62109-1/-2证据或欧盟低电压指令合规依据。中国安全报告还可能基于中国额定配置、标签、手册、浪涌保护和220/380 V假设，而比利时项目文件必须反映230/400 V、50 Hz安装条件和欧盟CE合规框架要求。
summary.zht: 中國光伏併網逆變器安全文件通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、國內CQC或CGC自願認證及CNAS認可實驗室報告。這些文件有助於供應商資質評估，但不能自動作為比利時項目的IEC 62109-1/-2證據或歐盟低電壓指令合規依據。中國安全報告還可能基於中國額定配置、標籤、手冊、浪湧保護和220/380 V假設，而比利時項目文件必須反映230/400 V、50 Hz安裝條件和歐盟CE合規框架要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary certification programmes for China domestic PV inverter safety and performance

gap.en: Gap: A China-only GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 safety file does not automatically satisfy Belgium IEC safety expectations or EU LVD 2014/35/EU requirements. Exporters should provide IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports for the supplied model or model family, confirm that labels and manuals match the Belgium configuration (230/400 V, 50 Hz), provide documentation in Dutch and/or French as required by the installation region, document protection coordination and earthing, and confirm surge protection. A CE Declaration of Conformity and technical file under LVD 2014/35/EU must be prepared before the product can be placed on the Belgian market. Any changes to enclosure, terminals, firmware settings, surge protection, or nameplate ratings for Belgium can require updated safety documentation.
gap.zh: 差距：仅中国GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不能自动满足比利时IEC安全要求或欧盟低电压指令2014/35/EU的要求。出口商应提供所供应型号或型号系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验报告，确认标签和手册匹配比利时配置（230/400 V、50 Hz），根据安装所在地区提供荷语和/或法语文件，记录保护配合和接地，并确认浪涌保护。产品在比利时市场销售前须依据低电压指令2014/35/EU准备CE符合性声明及技术文件。针对比利时对外壳、端子、固件设置、浪涌保护或铭牌额定值的任何变更，均可能需要更新安全文件。
gap.zht: 差距：僅中國GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不能自動滿足比利時IEC安全要求或歐盟低電壓指令2014/35/EU的要求。出口商應提供所供應型號或型號系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗報告，確認標籤和手冊匹配比利時配置（230/400 V、50 Hz），根據安裝所在地區提供荷語和/或法語文件，記錄保護配合和接地，並確認浪湧保護。產品在比利時市場銷售前須依據低電壓指令2014/35/EU準備CE符合性聲明及技術文件。針對比利時對外殼、端子、韌體設置、浪湧保護或銘牌額定值的任何變更，均可能需要更新安全文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU is required before placing PV inverters on the Belgian/EU market; IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports are the standard evidence route for safety conformity; Dutch/French documentation is effectively mandatory for Belgian installers and DSO acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T, NB/T, CQC, or CGC safety evidence applies to China domestic or voluntary certification contexts and is not automatically transferable to Belgium EU/CE conformity

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China GB/T or NB/T inverter safety files alone for Belgium PV projects. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence for the exact model, issue an EU Declaration of Conformity under LVD 2014/35/EU, align labels and manuals to Belgium's 230/400 V 50 Hz configuration, and prepare Dutch and/or French documentation as required by the installation region. Confirm current NBN, CREG, Elia, DSO (Fluvius/ORES/RESA), and project-owner safety requirements before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 比利时光伏项目不应仅依赖中国GB/T或NB/T逆变器安全文件。请为准确型号准备IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据，依据低电压指令2014/35/EU出具欧盟符合性声明，使标签和手册匹配比利时230/400 V、50 Hz配置，并根据安装所在地区准备荷语和/或法语文件。出货前请确认现行NBN、CREG、Elia、配电运营商（Fluvius/ORES/RESA）及项目业主安全要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 比利時光伏項目不應僅依賴中國GB/T或NB/T逆變器安全文件。請為準確型號準備IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據，依據低電壓指令2014/35/EU出具歐盟符合性聲明，使標籤和手冊匹配比利時230/400 V、50 Hz配置，並根據安裝所在地區準備荷語和/或法語文件。出貨前請確認現行NBN、CREG、Elia、配電運營商（Fluvius/ORES/RESA）及項目業主安全要求。
